content.en:
The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor looked at Ye Tian and began to tell about the origin of the Void Heaven Diagram.

"The Void Heaven Diagram is a supreme method created by the teacher for a long time after becoming a Dao Ancestor for countless years, but the Void Heaven Diagram that you have comprehended is just the foundation, but it is also extremely important, only by comprehending the Void Heaven Diagram can you cultivate the real supreme method, that is, the Void Heaven Dao Body!"

"Void Heaven Dao Body?" Ye Tian wondered.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor immediately explained the Void Heaven Dao Body.

The Void Heaven Dao Body is a kind of Dao body created by him, and there are various physiques in the universe, such as divine bodies, holy bodies, and even innate Dao bodies, but these physiques are just a bit famous in the universe, and they are just relatively ordinary physiques in the chaos.

And the Void Heaven Dao Body is an extremely powerful physique in the entire Chaos, once it has the Void Heaven Dao Body, the cultivation speed will increase many times, and the combat power will skyrocket.

For example, if a six-star peak god general opens the Void Heaven Dao Body, he can temporarily increase his strength and kill the weaker seven-star god general.

This is the terrifying thing about the Void Heaven Dao Body!

At the beginning, increasing the cultivation speed and increasing the combat effectiveness was just the external embodiment of the Void Heaven Dao Body, if it was just like this, it would not be positioned by the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor as the assessment of his own disciples.

The reason why the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor attaches great importance to the Void Heaven Dao Body is because once the Void Heaven Dao Body is condensed, the Dao Pattern can be condensed at the Earth Venerable level, and the more Dao Patterns are condensed, the stronger the potential, and even the future will become easier when merging the Dao.

Why is it so difficult?

That's because there is no point of convergence between itself and the avenue, so it is necessary to use the ancestral monument to forcibly open up that point, so as to achieve the convergence of the road.

But if you condense the innate Dao body and condense a large number of Dao patterns, you can directly give birth to that point, and you can successfully merge the Dao without even needing the ancestral monument.

Of course, this step is very difficult, after all, how many patterns are needed, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor is not very clear, after all, he has not cultivated the Void Heaven Dao Body.

However, several of his personal disciples practiced the Void Heaven Dao Body, although they couldn't create that point, but with the help of the ancestral tablet, they easily found that point and successfully merged with the Dao.

That is to say, once you practice the Void Heaven Dao Body, as long as you find an ancestral monument in the future, you can easily merge with the Dao.

This was a secret, known only to him and the few disciples who had cultivated the Void Heaven Dao Body.

This is also the reason why the Void Heaven One Pulse gave birth to several Dao Ancestors, but the other forces only thought that the Void Heaven One Pulse was lucky.

"Can I become a Dao Ancestor?"

Ye Tian wasn't sure if he could become a Dao Ancestor before, after all, no matter how powerful the copying talent was, it would only allow him to assist a lot of talents, but becoming a Dao Ancestor had little to do with talent.

Now, he learned that the Void Heaven Dao Body could make him a Dao Ancestor, how could he not be excited?

"Disciple, the Void Heaven Dao Body only increases your chances of becoming a Dao Ancestor many times, but if you don't work hard, becoming a Dao Ancestor is still just empty words!" sighed the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"Disciple understands!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Wow!

As soon as the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor pointed out, a large amount of information poured into Ye Tian's mind.

What appeared in his mind was the cultivation method of the Void Heaven Dao Body, and the core of this cultivation method was the regular route of the Void Heaven Diagram, only those who had thoroughly comprehended the Void Heaven Diagram could cultivate the Void Heaven Dao Body, otherwise if they forcibly cultivated, their physical bodies would be shattered by the rules.

"Remember, the Void Body Dao Body cannot be passed on lightly, but the Void Heaven Diagram is fine. If someone understands the Void Heaven Diagram, you can also accept disciples to teach the Void Heaven Dao Body!" the Void Heaven Dao Body reminded.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

Such a supreme method, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor did not even make restrictions, what kind of heart is this, if it were him, it is estimated that he would not be able to do so.

However, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor is an incomparably powerful existence among the Dao Ancestors, and he may not care about the Void Heaven Dao Body at all.

"Apprentice, you are now my personal disciple, in addition to the inheritance of the Void Heaven Dao Body, you can also enjoy the treatment of the Dao, but this is not the Void Heaven Realm, and your Dao identity will not gain much benefit. In this way, I will find a way to send you a batch of resources to assist you in your cultivation, and if you have any other requirements, you can also put them forward. "

Void Heaven Dao Ancestral Dao.

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "Master, I want a space-time type Chaos Divine Power and a relative Innate Origin Thing, the disciple found that after practicing the Chaos Divine Power, he can condense the prototype of the Great Dao." Therefore, the disciple wanted to practice a space-time chaotic supernatural power, condense the prototype of the space-time avenue, and then use the prototype of the space-time avenue as the foundation to condense the prototype of the chaotic avenue. "

"Apprentice, have you practiced a Chaos Divine Power?"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was a little surprised.

This wisp of his consciousness is actually not strong, and he does not carry any power, otherwise the Great Universe Origin would not let him in.

Therefore, he couldn't see Ye Tian's situation, if his body was there, he could naturally see at a glance how many magical powers Ye Tian had cultivated.

Ye Tian immediately cast the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power, and saw a layer of Gu Yuan's protective light enveloping his whole body, which was the protective light of the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power.

"Gu Yuan's Imperial Body Divine Power, I didn't expect you to really practice a Chaos Divine Power. You did a good job, you are cultivating the Great Dao of Chaos, if you use the corresponding Great Dao of the Ancient Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power as the foundation, it will indeed affect your supreme foundation. But there's one thing, you're wrong. You have cultivated the Chaos Dao, but your Fundamental Dao does not have to go through the Chaos Dao. I don't know exactly what your chances are, but I do know that you should be able to condense a lot of rudiments of the Great Dao, so I suggest you the Endless Dao. "

Void Heaven Dao Ancestral Dao.

"Endless Avenue?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

"Yes, the Endless Avenue, this is not one avenue, but countless avenues. Your Chaos Avenue is actually just a mutilated version, just a Chaos Avenue composed of 12 attribute avenues, although the Tao gives birth to one, everything in life. But if you only condense the twelve Great Dao, then it is not a powerful Great Dao at all. Do you know that in the chaos, some powerful True Ancestors have even condensed dozens of avenues, dozens of complete avenues. Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said.

"What!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said again: "Disciple, if you practice the Void Heaven Dao Body, you can engrave the Dao pattern on the Void Heaven Dao Body, a avenue represents a Dao pattern, if you condense the prototype of the Dao of Time and Space, you can condense the time and space Dao pattern on the Void Heaven Dao Body, if you have the opportunity, before you become the Heavenly Mandate Heavenly Monarch, try to condense as many avenue prototypes, don't be limited to the twelve avenues, other avenues should also be involved one by one, the more condensed Dao patterns, the better." For others, cultivating more avenues is not a good thing, but refinement is the king. But you are different, your goal is Dao Ancestor, and other people's goal is only True Ancestor, if you only target True Ancestor, it is a bad thing to cultivate more Dao Dao......"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said a lot, and Ye Tian gradually understood.

At this moment, he has found the path that suits him best.

That's right, he can completely use his copying talent to condense countless Great Dao Prototypes and advance the Void Heaven Dao Body to a very terrifying level, and at that time, he can even achieve the position of Dao Ancestor on his own without even needing an ancestral monument.
